name: Space Wars
short_description: Defend Earth's orbital station from alien invaders in SPACE WARS, a fast-paced arcade shooter. Customize your ship, upgrade weapons, and battle through intense levels to save humanity in this action-packed space adventure.
detailed_description:
Step into the cockpit of a customizable spacecraft and defend Earth from a relentless alien invasion in SPACE WARS, an immersive arcade scrolling shooter. Battle through 15 challenging levels across 3 unique locations as you destroy enemy ships, face powerful bosses, and protect the orbital station from total destruction. Upgrade your ship with advanced weapons, shields, and abilities by collecting power-ups from broken capsules. Stunning visuals and atmospheric soundtracks will transport you into the heart of the space battle, making each mission feel more intense as you fight to save humanity.



Key Features:
  • Ship Customization: Upgrade your ship’s weapons, shields, and speed to fit your combat style.
  • Diverse Enemies: Face 10 types of enemy ships with unique attack patterns.
  • Powerful Boss Battles: Test your skills in epic confrontations with massive alien bosses.
  • Immersive Visuals: Experience detailed 2D/2.5D space environments and smooth combat animations.
  • Challenging Progression: Complete 15 levels with increasing difficulty across 3 different locations.
